title: Project Context
subtitle: Markdown docs under specs/, docs/, and insights/ folders — read fresh on every run.
errorBody: Something went wrong loading this repo's documents.

notAvailable.title: No local clone available
notAvailable.body: This repo hasn't been cloned locally yet, so its documents can't be discovered. Once it's cloned, files under specs/, docs/, and insights/ folders will appear here.

list.emptyBody: Add markdown files under a specs/, docs/, or insights/ folder in this repo to see them here.

footer.minutesAgo: {count, plural, one {# minute ago} other {# minutes ago}}
footer.hoursAgo: {count, plural, one {# hour ago} other {# hours ago}}
footer.daysAgo: {count, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}

drawer.resyncWarning: Editing here does not commit to git. A repo resync runs "git reset --hard", which discards any uncommitted changes to this file.
